conversations_memory:
**Work context**

Kory manages multiple Thai Facebook pages spanning several niches, including horoscope/fortune telling, a Liverpool FC fan community, and financial/crypto trading content. Kory appears to operate these pages independently, using AI tools and automation platforms to build and run content pipelines.

**Personal context**

Kory communicates primarily in Thai and has interests spanning crypto/financial markets, football (Liverpool FC), and Thai-language entertainment content including fortune telling and ghost stories. Kory is engaged with emerging AI tools and their practical applications.

**Top of mind**

Kory recently completed a significant Make.com automation build for a Thai-language crypto/trading Facebook page ("กระทิงล้วนๆไม่มีหมีผสม"), with four daily AI-generated posts covering Bitcoin, AltCoins, Gold, and market news — using live price data from CoinGecko and Frankfurter APIs, AI-generated images via Pollinations.ai, and a private daily email performance report. A Gmail OAuth connection in Make.com still needs to be configured to enable fully automated email delivery.

**Brief history**

*Recent months*

Kory has been heavily focused on building automated Facebook content systems using Make.com with Claude as an orchestration layer. Key completed builds include: a manual-trigger Liverpool FC news/analysis scenario (ID 5396487) for the สายด่วนหงส์แดง page using Gemini with Google Search grounding and a static fallback image; a daily horoscope video scenario (ID 5396682) for the ดูดวงวันนี้ page using HeyGen with the Violante_Sport_Sitting_Side_public avatar and Thai voice ID cd658f1164c1489093607163fc83ba62; and the trading page multi-post pipeline described above. Kory also explored a NotebookLM audio-to-video workflow (e.g., using CapCut or Pictory.ai) and showed interest in a ghost story content page with daily Thai-language stories.

Kory asked about Claude usage limits and extra usage credits — key takeaways were that credits don't expire, that third-party integrations can burn credits quickly, and that monitoring via Settings > Usage was advised before purchasing large amounts.

Kory also drafted a friendly Thai workplace group message communicating kitchen access rules (approval required from Wichet and Beam) and stair safety guidelines for carrying trays.

*Earlier context*

Kory explored investment analysis topics including vertical farming (assessed as a long-term opportunity but near-term risk, with input suppliers preferred over farm operators) and AVAX/Avalanche price forecasts for 2025–2026. Kory also requested a UK-market coffee machine rent-vs-buy interactive HTML comparison tool with real supplier pricing in GBP, break-even analysis, and UK tax considerations.

Kory showed early interest in building multi-agent AI teams using tools like Claude, Make.com, and integrations with platforms such as Google Drive, Asana, Canva, and Slack — with crypto market analysis and content creation as target use cases.

---

**Make.com technical reference** *(for continuity)*

- Team ID: `1307925` | Org ID: `7022638`
- Connections: Gemini AI `6119948`, Facebook Pages `6119863`, HeyGen `6120104`, Google `6119927`, Google-email `6119805`
- Facebook page IDs: ดวงวันนี้ `985871267951939`, กระทิงล้วนๆไม่มีหมีผสม `110404957109718`, สายด่วนหงส์แดง `1058758183984821`
- Use `http:MakeRequest` (v4) not `http:ActionSendData`; CoinGecko hyphenated keys must be passed as raw strings to Gemini for parsing; Thailand UTC+7 requires subtracting 7 hours for Make scheduling; `google-email` OAuth connection does not support SMTP and cannot send automated emails — a separate Gmail OAuth connection is needed

project_memories.019dd69c-4aa6-70c3-94fc-cc1a81f521c5:
**Purpose & context**

Kory (full name Korakot Kongponsrisiri) is building **SiamEPOS**, a full-featured point-of-sale system targeting Thai restaurants in the UK. The product is bilingual (English/Thai) and is being developed as a commercial SaaS offering. Kory has operational restaurant knowledge but came to this project as a beginner developer, learning by building iteratively with Claude as the primary code collaborator.

The project is maturing into a multi-agent AI-assisted development team:
- **Krit** — EPOS dev agent (core system)
- **Web** — Web dev agent, handles siamepos.co.uk marketing site and the embeddable booking widget
- **Nick** — Business advisor agent for SiamEPOS (pricing, restaurant onboarding strategy)
- **Claude** — Functioning as primary Code Agent

**UK trademark filed 11/05/2026**: Application number UK00004385501. Figurative mark (lotus logo + SiamEPOS text). Classes 9 and 42. Owner: Korakot Kongponsrisiri, 100 North End Road, London W14 9EX. Reference: SiamEPOS-TM-2025.

---

**Current state**

**Environment**: Kory has switched from a Windows PC to a **MacBook Pro M5 Pro 24GB**. Project path is now `/Users/korakot/Desktop/restaurant-epos`. Railway, Netlify, and GitHub are unchanged.

**AdminScreen refactor (8 May 2026)**: Refactored into 17 files — `AdminScreen.jsx` (shell), `admin/shared.js`, and 15 section files including inventory subtabs.

**Next priority**: Invoice Delete feature to fix COGS calculation (SEPOS open item).

**Recently shipped (May 2026)**:
- Demo site live at **siamepos.net** (Netlify + Namecheap; separate from siamepos.co.uk). Demo restaurant = **Baan Siam**
- Desktop app shipped: signed Mac DMG + Windows EXE with auto-update. Mac versions up to v1.4.6
- **SEPOS-033 CRM**: Brevo campaigns + Make.com lapsed/birthday/post-visit webhooks
- **SEPOS-034 Takeaway**: Shipped with mock payment; real Stripe (per-restaurant keys) = SEPOS-040 pending
- **SEPOS-044 Floor Plan**: Tap-to-seat, pre-claim badges, takeaway strip, bill peek, auto-complete on pay
- **SEPOS-045 Counter Mode**: Per-device toggle, no table/covers/service charge, `order_type='counter'`
- **Website Builder**: Live in back office — AI URL import, 3 colour presets, 5 photo slots, HTML export (requires `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` on back-office Railway)
- **SEPOS-PRO-002/003**: Bidirectional active-order sync via `cloud_id` columns; cloud→Mac socket.io relay, sync tick reduced to 5s for sub-second propagation; Kitchen Direct Mode (per-device toggle skips Pass tab)
- Also shipped: VAT items, wastage cost, auto stock, void types, resend reasons, clock in/out, VAT/Making Tax Digital compliance

---

**On the horizon**

- **SEPOS-040**: Real Stripe integration with per-restaurant keys
- Invoice Delete feature (fix COGS calculation) — immediate next priority
- Marketing Agent setup via Make.com (discussed, not yet started)
- Five killer features pitch live at siamepos.co.uk/features.html: Online Reservation, Table Map + KDS, Online Takeaway 0% fee, AI Sales-vs-Cost, Mobile as Terminal

---

**Key learnings & principles**

- **Always provide complete file replacements**, not partial snippets — this was an explicit, firm preference established early after repeated confusion with partial edits
- Common failure patterns to avoid: BillScreen rendering inside the order flex layout (fix: React fragment wrapper); white screens from missing function definitions in AdminScreen.jsx (fix: place functions before `export default`); IP address drift when switching WiFi (fix: update `SERVER_URL` in `api.js`)
- Mac desktop app install command: `xattr -cr ~/Downloads/SiamEPOS.Setup.dmg && open ~/Downloads/SiamEPOS.Setup.dmg` (removes macOS quarantine on signed DMG)
- Restaurant workflow knowledge is strong — Kory makes confident product decisions on course firing, pass station logic, KDS conventions, and cash reconciliation

---

**Current feature inventory**

**Core EPOS**: PIN login + roles, table map + timers, orders + modifiers + courses, KDS, bar screen, bill + tip, split bill, move + merge, offline mode

**Admin**: Trading summary, menu + AI scanner, table plan editor, reports, bill records, Z report + till reconciliation, staff management, settings

**Inventory**: Stock, recipe costing, food cost %, stock log, AI invoice scanner, cost vs sales

**Allergens**: 14-allergen tracking, auto recipes, Natasha's Law compliance

**Reservations**: Widget, availability engine, confirmation emails, management screen; Customer Records (Guests tab) live inside ReservationsScreen

**Website Builder**: Two template styles:
1. *Elegant/Fine Dining* — Ivory & Sage or Burgundy & Gold, Cormorant Garamond serif, minimal spacing
2. *Vibrant/Casual* — Hot pink `#E8386A`, Playfair Display bold, scrolling ticker, big promo numbers, square dish grid

---

**Tools & resources**

- **Deployment**: Railway (backend), Netlify (frontend + demo site), GitHub
- **Automation**: Make.com (CRM webhooks, marketing flows)
- **Email/CRM**: Brevo
- **Domains**: siamepos.co.uk (marketing), siamepos.net (demo)
- **Desktop**: Electron app (signed Mac DMG + Windows EXE, auto-update)
- **AI integrations**: Claude API / `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` (Website Builder AI import, menu scanner, invoice scanner)
- **Stack**: Node.js / Express / SQLite (backend), React / Vite (frontend)
